description: Operator edit changes a factual claim in the AI's reply (a price). Non-NO_FIX category (FAQ). Witness quote MUST be a non-empty verbatim span from the edit. Tests that the agent never produces a non-NO_FIX classification with empty witness_quote.
agentMessageDraft: Late checkout is available for an additional 50 EUR per hour after 11am.
operatorEdited: Late checkout is available for an additional 30 EUR per hour after 11am.
